description: A fresh take on classic crocs clogs, these clogs from Crocs are a combination of shoes and clogs: duet! Enjoy the comfort of clogs and toughness of shoes in a single footwear. Jump around in them at the park, lounge in them at home, or take a walk on the beach in these youthful clogs...perfect for all situations, and look fab with all your casual clothes.Upper Fully moulded dual intensity Croslite upper with a closed toe deisgn for  style, durability and comfort Holes on the forefoot for increased ventilation and jibbitz shoe charms Heel-hugging back strap for fashionable comfort Brand name embossed on forefoot and heel Brand tab on sides of both straps Midsole Croslite footbed with circulation nubs for a massage-like feel Floral design along the periphery of the shoe for a fun look Brand logo embossed on footbed Outsole Non-marking, slip-resistant Croslite outsole Multi-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and backfoot for ample grip, stability and comfort Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
